visuals.title: Strong vs Weak Scaling Comparison
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Scalability in Parallel Systems</text>
  
  <!-- Central Concept -->
  <rect x="160" y="100" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parallel Processing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Scaling Up -->
  <rect x="280" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Scale Up
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Scaling Out -->
  <rect x="280" y="140" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="330" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Scale Out
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Performance -->
  <rect x="40" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Performance
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Efficiency -->
  <rect x="40" y="140" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Efficiency
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <line x1="260" y1="110" x2="280" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="260" y1="130" x2="280" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="160" y1="110" x2="140" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="160" y1="130" x2="140" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Bottom Labels -->
  <text x="210" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Scalability = Ability to maintain performance as system size increases
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="100" y="250" width="220" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Key Goal: Linear Speedup
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
